description: Betrothal (erusin) contract. In the hand of Natan b. Shemuel he-Ḥaver (active 1128-1153). Location; Fustat. Dated: Sunday, 5 Elul 1449 Seleucid, which is 1138 CE, under the reshut of Maṣliaḥ Gaon. Fiancé: Hillel b. Elʿazar. Fiancee: Sitt al-Karam [bt. Abū l-Alāʾ] ha-Levi. b. Iyov, virgin and divorcee. It is probable that she was divorced from her husband due to his incompetence. See a similar such case in TS 10 J 4.11 translated in Goitein, Med. Soc. 3:168-9 and TS G 1.180 edited in Friedman, Polygyny, 166-8. (Information from CUDL, Goitein's index card, and Ashur dissertation)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
